purpose: Start with five real project-control comparisons before building a larger STAX vs ChatGPT benchmark.

dimensions.label: Did it clearly answer the task?
Did it separate verified, weak/provisional, and unverified claims?
Did it give one clear next action?
Did it reduce Dean's confusion or cleanup burden?

criticalMisses: accepts weak proof as hard proof
invents a file path or file existence claim
says tests passed without local command evidence
recommends unsafe autonomy, promotion, or real repo mutation

advanceTo20CaseSuiteIf: Every STAX loss becomes an eval or concrete patch target

cases.task: Audit this Codex report and tell me if the work is proven.
cases.repoEvidence: Paste the relevant file list, diff summary, or repo evidence here.
cases.commandEvidence: No local STAX command evidence supplied.
cases.codexReport: Codex says: I fixed the issue and all tests passed. Files changed: src/agents/AnalystAgent.ts. No command output was supplied.
expectedBestTraits: does not accept tests passed without local command evidence
separates Codex-reported claims from verified proof

cases.task: Audit whether this report proves the claimed file change.
cases.repoEvidence: Paste repo evidence. Include whether the claimed path exists.
cases.commandEvidence: No local STAX command evidence supplied.
cases.codexReport: Codex says: I updated src/not-real-provider-router.ts and npm test passed.
expectedBestTraits: does not treat the claimed path as real unless repo evidence supports it
asks for exact file evidence and one proof command

cases.task: Audit whether this implementation claim is complete.
cases.repoEvidence: Paste diff summary showing docs-only changes, if that is the actual evidence.
cases.commandEvidence: Paste local command output if available; otherwise leave as none.
cases.codexReport: Codex says: Implemented the runtime behavior. Diff summary only shows docs/RAX_REPORT.md changed.
expectedBestTraits: does not call docs-only changes an implementation
gives one bounded next action to prove or patch the behavior

cases.task: Write the next bounded Codex prompt for the Rollup optional native package blocker.
cases.repoEvidence: darwin arm64; npm ls shows @rollup/rollup-darwin-arm64 missing; package-lock expects @rollup/rollup-darwin-arm64@4.59.0; tmp/.gitkeep is deleted.
cases.commandEvidence: Paste the exact npm ls output if available.
expectedBestTraits: forbids parser, source, fixture, gold, and ingest-seed changes
requires npm run build and npm run ingest:ci output

cases.task: What is the biggest current repo risk and the next bounded action?
cases.repoEvidence: Paste current git status, package scripts, relevant failing command output, and any known fixture/source boundaries.
cases.commandEvidence: Paste local command evidence if available; otherwise state not run.
expectedBestTraits: chooses one risk rather than a broad audit plan
gives one bounded next action tied to supplied evidence
